description: Sandal boot for teens - this pair is fresh out of enroute's design studio for its teen collection. A dressy yet casual footwear option, this is a shoe closet essential. Upper Metallic thong style upper Thick ankle strap with a velcro closure at the back Padded footbed Outsole TPU textured outsole with an upraised heel Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
